   208  func assignLaunchSessionNames(rt Runtime, live []Session, cwd string, args LaunchArgs, base string, stderr io.Writer) ([]Session, map[string]string, map[string]SessionNameEntry, bool) {
   209    scope, err := ResolveRepoScope(cwd)
   210    if err != nil {
   211      return live, nil, nil, true
   212    }
   213    index, err := rt.ReadSessionNameIndex()
   214    if err != nil {
   215      index = SessionNameIndex{}
   216    }
   217    scopedLive := live
   218    if len(index.Entries) > 0 {
   219      scopedLive = SessionsForScope(live, index, scope)
   220    }
   221    tags := launchNameTags(args, base)
   222    if len(tags) == 0 {
   223      return scopedLive, nil, nil, true
   224    }
   225    names := map[string]string{}
   226    newEntries := map[string]SessionNameEntry{}
   227    for _, tag := range tags {
   228      if tag == "" {
   229        continue
   230      }
   231      name, updated, err := AssignSessionName(index, live, scope, tag, func(session string) bool {
   232        return rt.ProbeSessionName(session) == nil
   233      })
   234      if err != nil {
   235        fmt.Fprintf(stderr, "pair: %v\n", err)
   236        return nil, nil, nil, false
   237      }
   238      if len(updated.Entries) > len(index.Entries) {
   239        entry := updated.Entries[len(updated.Entries)-1]
   240        newEntries[tag] = entry
   241      }
   242      index = updated
   243      names[tag] = name
   244    }
   245    return scopedLive, names, newEntries, true
   246  }

    24  // DecideLaunch decides the launch action without touching zellij, fzf, or disk.
    25  func DecideLaunch(args LaunchArgs, snap SessionSnapshot) (LaunchDecision, error) {
    26    if args.SelectedTag != "" {
    27      return createDecision(args.SelectedTag, sessionNameForTag(snap, args.SelectedTag), false), nil
    28    }
    29    if args.ForcedTag != "" {
    30      name := sessionNameForTag(snap, args.ForcedTag)
    31      if sessionBlocksReuse(snap, name) {
    32        return LaunchDecision{Action: ActionAttach, Tag: args.ForcedTag, SessionName: name}, nil
    33      }
    34      return createDecision(args.ForcedTag, name, false), nil
    35    }
    36    if hasDetached(snap) || len(snap.Historical) > 0 {
    37      return LaunchDecision{Action: ActionPick}, nil
    38    }
    39    tag := snap.BaseTag
    40    if tag == "" {
    41      tag = "pair"
    42    }
    43    tag = nextFreeTag(tag, snap)
    44    return createDecision(tag, sessionNameForTag(snap, tag), true), nil
    45  }

    37  func buildPickRows(snap SessionSnapshot, base string, nowEpoch int64) (display []string, byPlain map[string]pickSelection) {
    38    byPlain = map[string]pickSelection{}
    39    live := map[string]bool{}
    40    for _, s := range snap.Sessions {
    41      live[sessionTag(s)] = true
    42    }
    43
    44    add := func(plain, colored string, sel pickSelection) {
    45      display = append(display, colored)
    46      byPlain[plain] = sel
    47    }
    48
    49    for _, s := range snap.Sessions {
    50      if s.State != SessionDetached {
    51        continue
    52      }
    53      plain := livePickLabel(s)
    54      add(plain, ansiGreen+plain+ansiReset, pickSelection{tag: sessionTag(s)})
    55    }
    56
    57    for _, h := range snap.Historical {
    58      if live[h.Tag] {
    59        continue // already surfaced as a live row
    60      }
    61      if h.LegacyUnscoped {
    62        plain := fmt.Sprintf("legacy unscoped %s  (manual import)", h.Tag)
    63        add(plain, AgeColor(int((nowEpoch-h.MTime.Unix())/secondsPerDay))+plain+ansiReset, pickSelection{tag: h.Tag, legacy: true})
    64        continue
    65      }
    66      baseRow := historicalPickLabel(h, nowEpoch)
    67      badgePlain, badgeColored := "", ""
    68      if h.QueueCount > 0 {
    69        badgePlain = fmt.Sprintf("   [⏎ %d queued]", h.QueueCount)
    70        badgeColored = fmt.Sprintf("   %s[⏎ %d queued]%s", ansiAmber, h.QueueCount, ansiReset)
    71      }
    72      days := int((nowEpoch - h.MTime.Unix()) / secondsPerDay)
    73      add(baseRow+badgePlain, AgeColor(days)+baseRow+ansiReset+badgeColored, pickSelection{tag: h.Tag})
    74    }
    75
    76    newLabel := fmt.Sprintf("+ new %s session", base)
    77    add(newLabel, newLabel, pickSelection{isNew: true})
    78    return display, byPlain
   103  func historicalPickLabel(h HistoricalTag, nowEpoch int64) string {
   104    age := FormatAge(nowEpoch, h.MTime.Unix())
   105    if h.RepoName != "" || h.Agent != "" {
   106      agent := h.Agent
   107      if agent == "" {
   108        agent = "?"
   109      }
   110      repo := h.RepoName
   111      if repo == "" {
   112        repo = "?"
   113      }
   114      return fmt.Sprintf("%s/%s  %s  (%s, no live session)", repo, h.Tag, agent, age)
   115    }
   116    return fmt.Sprintf("pair-%s  (%s, no live session)", h.Tag, age)
   117  }

```verdict
verdict: REWORK
confidence: high
```

The scoped identity implementation is much closer after the previous review fixes, and the Go test suite passes. It still under-delivers the issue’s core contract in live selection/history flows: explicit agent launches can still route to another agent via the picker, unindexed live sessions can leak across repos, historical picker rows are not enriched from the ledger, and `git diff --check` currently fails on a generated review artifact.

1. Strengths

- Scoped public session naming is centralized in [session_index.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/launcher/session_index.go:94), with same-name repo disambiguation covered.
- Prompted custom tags now reassign scoped session names after final tag choice in [createflow.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/launcher/createflow.go:281).
- Restart/compaction now pass/use `PAIR_TAG` or the live zellij session instead of always reconstructing `pair-<tag>` in [restart.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/launcher/restart.go:15) and [compaction.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/launcher/compaction.go:22).
- Sessionwatch now appends a ledger row after async session id discovery in [run.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/sessionwatch/run.go:95).

2. Critical Findings

- [decision.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/launcher/decision.go:36) / [createflow.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/launcher/createflow.go:161): explicit `pair codex -- <args>` can still enter the picker and launch/attach an inferred non-codex agent. This contradicts the issue’s Done-when that explicit codex args “never launch a different agent.” Fix by bypassing incompatible picker/resume flows for explicit agent+args, or filtering choices to compatible agent rows. ARCH-PURPOSE.
- [createflow.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/launcher/createflow.go:217): when `session-names.jsonl` is absent/empty, all live `pair-*` sessions are treated as current-scope. A fresh upgraded repo can still see/attach another repo’s unindexed session. Fix by treating unindexed live sessions as legacy candidates unless index or pane metadata proves ownership. ARCH-PURPOSE.
- [history.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/launcher/history.go:47): real scoped historical rows are returned without repo/agent metadata, so [pick.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/launcher/pick.go:103) falls back to `pair-<tag>` labels. This misses the documented “picker annotates each row with its agent” requirement. Enrich history rows from ledger/latest agent and scope display metadata. ARCH-PURPOSE.
- [000107-repo-scoped-tags-and-session-ledger-close-review.md](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/workshop/plans/000107-repo-scoped-tags-and-session-ledger-close-review.md:232): `git diff --check 6d07264e75eb987baa5887f5b678e60cb1dae01e..HEAD` fails with trailing whitespace and many “space before tab in indent” errors in the generated close-review artifact. Fix or remove/normalize that artifact before crossing the boundary.

3. Important Findings

- [history.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/launcher/history.go:41): historical rows are sorted alphabetically, not by ledger recency, and there is no clear “continue last session” behavior for bare `pair`. This appears short of Startup 1.2 / Done-when “bare pair offers continue last session for current repo, inheriting agent+params.”
- The durable plan has many unchecked implementation steps after Task 6 while the issue checklist says complete. Align `workshop/plans/000107-...plan.md` with actual completion state.

4. Minor Findings

- [README.md](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/README.md:194) still describes `pair list` as listing `pair-*` sessions and rename as refusing `pair-<old>`, which is stale under scoped public session names.
- [list.go](/Users/xianxu/workspace/pair/cmd/internal/launcher/list.go:9) still has `pair-<tag>` comments.

5. Test Coverage Notes

Passed: `go test ./cmd/internal/launcher ./cmd/internal/sessionwatch -count=1` and `go test ./...`.

Failed: `git diff --check 6d07264e75eb987baa5887f5b678e60cb1dae01e..HEAD`.

Missing tests should cover explicit-agent picker safety, empty-index live-session isolation, real historical picker agent annotation from ledger, and bare `pair` last-session behavior.

6. Architectural Notes

- ARCH-DRY: mostly improved, but public session parsing still exists as fallback behavior in selection paths.
- ARCH-PURE: passes overall; the pure model is separated from IO.
- ARCH-PURPOSE: fails. The single-source scoped model is not enforced for all consumers yet.

7. Plan Revision Recommendations

Add a `## Revisions` entry noting that explicit-agent picker behavior, empty-index live-session ownership, historical ledger annotation, bare-pair last-session selection, and diff-check cleanup remain required before close.
